title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Runtime Lens: Python Requirements Decomposition
summary: Deliver a trustworthy local automation product for a community program with operator and learner documentation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python requirements decomposition increment in a production-shaped local automation capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder stories into explicit inputs, outputs, invariants, failures, acceptance checks, and staged implementation work.
Use coverage, mutation ideas, static analysis, formatting, and review as complementary evidence rather than score chasing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
